title: Define Wave 31 manager assignment center contract
description: Extend architecture docs with the manager assignment center API/UI contract, including queue list and detail payloads, action states, and manager-only auth/session behavior across assignment workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Manager assignment center contract documents queue list payload, detail payload, and completion/retry action metadata
UI state map covers loading, empty, success, forbidden, unauthorized, session-expired, and action error states
Module ownership and API boundary for assignment center are explicit and additive to existing dashboard and handoff flows
